case.title: U S EX REL WENGER v. MATHUES

opinion.h4: U S EX REL WENGER v. MATHUES, (1929)
opinion.h2: The UNITED STATES of America ex rel. Joseph Wenger, appellant, v. W. Frank MATHUES, United States Marshal for the Eastern District of Pennsylvania.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. Joseph Blank, of Philadelphia, Pa., for appellant.
Messrs. William D. Mitchell, Sol. Gen., and W. Marvin Smith, both of Washington, D. C., for the United States.

The appeal is dismissed on the authority of section 240(b) and (c) of the Judicial Code, as amended by the act of February 13, 1925, 1 (43 Stat. 938; 28 USCA 347(b) and (c), for lack of jurisdiction.[ U S ex rel Wenger v. Mathues (1929) ]
